users.title: User Management
users.confirmDelete: Are you sure to delete this user?

field.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

config.title: System Configuration
config.confirmDelete: Are you sure to delete this config?

desc.server_external_url: Server public URL for Agent connection (e.g. http://your-ip:18080)
desc.ai_quota_daily_limit: Daily AI call limit per user
desc.ai_channel_telegram_provider: Telegram dedicated AI provider (empty=follow channel default)
desc.ai_channel_discord_provider: Discord dedicated AI provider (empty=follow channel default)
desc.ai_channel_dingtalk_provider: DingTalk dedicated AI provider (empty=follow channel default)
desc.ai_channel_feishu_provider: Feishu dedicated AI provider (empty=follow channel default)
desc.ai_channel_slack_provider: Slack dedicated AI provider (empty=follow channel default)
desc.ai_channel_wechat_work_provider: WeCom dedicated AI provider (empty=follow channel default)
desc.ai_context_tool_result_max_length: Max retained chars for tool results
desc.ai_tool_output_max_lines: Max log output lines returned by AI tools (tail N lines)
desc.ai_planning_min_message_length: Min message length to trigger planning

risk.title: Risk Control
risk.scriptRequired: Please enter script content to assess
risk.bannedPlaceholder: Enter command to ban, e.g. rm -rf /
risk.highPlaceholder: Enter high risk command, e.g. reboot
risk.lowPlaceholder: Enter low risk command, e.g. uptime

scriptAssess.title: Script Risk Assessment
scriptAssess.description: Paste script content to assess the risk level of each command

aiConfig.title: AI Model Configuration
aiConfig.removeProviderConfirm: Are you sure to remove this provider?

provider.modelHint: Select from list or enter custom model name
provider.temperatureHint: Controls output randomness. 0 = deterministic, 2 = maximum randomness
provider.topPHint: Nucleus sampling parameter, controls text generation diversity
provider.providerMaxTokensHint: Maximum output tokens per request for this provider
provider.copilotLogoutConfirm: Are you sure to revoke GitHub Copilot authorization?
provider.copilotDeviceCodeHint: Enter the following code on the GitHub page:

quota.title: Usage Limits
quota.chatTimeoutHint: Maximum wait time for AI chat requests

channel.title: Chat Channel Configuration
channel.description: Configure external chat channels for AI interactions via Telegram, Discord, DingTalk, etc.
channel.contextModeHint: persistent: keep conversation context; stateless: each message starts fresh
channel.sessionTimeoutHint: Auto-start new session after this idle period, 0 means never expire
channel.defaultProviderHint: Default AI provider for all channels, empty follows system default
channel.defaultModelHint: Default model for all channels, empty follows provider default
channel.channelProviderHint: AI provider for this channel only, empty follows channel default
channel.channelModelHint: Model for this channel only, empty follows provider default
channel.newCommandHint: Users can send /new in the chat to reset session context and start a fresh conversation

addProviderModal.title: Add Custom Provider
addProviderModal.keyHint: Unique identifier, lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only
addProviderModal.label: Provider Name

embedding.title: Embedding Model Configuration
embedding.description: Configure embedding model for SOP and Memory features

orchestrator.title: AI Orchestrator Configuration
orchestrator.description: Configure AI Agent runtime parameters such as max iterations, tool call limits, etc.
orchestrator.maxConsecutiveErrorsHint: Agent stops after this many errors
orchestrator.riskControlLink: Go to Risk Control to configure dangerous command rules
orchestrator.systemPromptOverrideHint: Custom system prompt, leave empty for default

scheduled.title: Scheduled Tasks
scheduled.confirmDelete: Are you sure to delete this task?

field.name: Task Name
field.notifyAiPromptPlaceholder: Optional: e.g. 'Notify me when CPU usage exceeds 90%% or disk usage exceeds 85%%'

cron.hint: Spring Cron 6-field format: Sec Min Hour Day Month Week

approval.title: Task Approval
approval.confirmApproveDesc: The task will be executed immediately after approval
approval.confirmRejectDesc: The task will not be executed after rejection

chat.prompt1: Check system status on all servers
chat.toolsTooltip: Enable AI to use system tools for operations
chat.inputPlaceholder: Type a message, press Enter to send...
chat.aiDescription: I can help you manage servers, execute scripts, analyze logs, and more

chat.input_placeholder: Type a message, press Enter to send...

agent.title: Agent Management
agent.confirmDelete: Delete this agent? Built-in agents cannot be deleted.

field.name: Agent Name
field.nameMax: Name must be 50 characters or less
field.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this agent does
field.modelHint: Leave empty to inherit model settings from main AI config
field.systemPromptPlaceholder: Define this agent's behavior and capabilities...

memory.title: Memory Management
memory.clearAllConfirm: Clear all memory data? This cannot be undone.

host.title: Host Management
host.agentOutdated: Agent outdated ({{current}}). Please reinstall to update to {{latest}}
host.invalidIP: Please input a valid IP address
host.reinstallDescription: This will re-download and install the latest Agent version
host.confirmBatchReinstall: Confirm batch reinstall Agent on {{count}} hosts?
host.confirmUninstall: Confirm uninstall Agent from this host?
host.uninstallDescription: This will remotely stop Agent service, delete Agent files, and remove the host record from the platform
host.confirmDeleteHost: Confirm delete this host from database?
host.deleteHostDescription: Only removes the host record from the database without remote uninstallation. Use this when the host is unreachable.
host.serverUrlNotConfigured: Server external URL is not configured. Agents deployed to hosts will not be able to connect back to the server. Please go to System → Configuration and set server.external-url.
host.privateKeyPlaceholder: Paste SSH private key content (PEM format)
host.deployNowTip: Uncheck to only save host info, deploy later in batch
host.importDescription: Import hosts via CSV file. Imported hosts will have 'Pending' status and can be batch deployed.
host.importSuccess: Successfully imported {{count}} hosts, deployment started automatically
host.confirmDeleteCredential: Confirm delete this pending host record?

cluster.title: Cluster Management
cluster.confirmRemoveAgent: Confirm remove this host from cluster?

files.title: File Manager
files.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
files.fileTooLarge: File size exceeds the maximum limit ({{max}}MB)
